Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.CourseUpcoming

Represents basic information about course and related plans/events/tasks.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Tasks

List of tasks with deadline on the day.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.TaskSimple

None.
Plans

List of plans on the day.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.PlanSimple

None.
CalendarEvents

List of events scheduled on the day.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.CalendarEventSimple

None.
CourseId

The unique id for the course, in scope of a site (itslearning customer).

 integer

None.
Title

The course title.

 string

None.
FriendlyName

The course friendly name.

 string

None.
CourseColor

Color code for the course.

 string

None.
CourseFillColor

Fill color code for the course.

 string

None.
CourseCode

Code for the course.

 string

None.
